---
name: direction-guard
description: Check whether a proposed change aligns with project goals and does not contradict recorded decisions. Use before starting significant work.
---

# Direction Guard

Verify proposed work aligns with project goals and does not contradict recorded decisions.

## Workflow

1. Read `project-brief.md` for Goals and Non-Goals
2. Check proposed work against goals (aligned, uncharted, or misaligned)
3. Check `omcc_decision_list` via `omcc_decision_check`
4. Report alignment; suggest `/pivot` if contradicting a decision
